isms.subtitle: Information Security Management System
isms.statement: STAR UP, Inc. has obtained certification under ISO/IEC 27001:2022, the international standard for Information Security Management Systems (ISMS), in order to properly protect our customers' information assets and operate a business worthy of their trust.
isms.scopeValue: AI-driven joint development and new business development / Development of AI products / AI SaaS business for manufacturing / Recruitment agency services

guidelines.1: We take appropriate organizational and technical measures to reliably protect the confidentiality, integrity, and availability of information assets, and respond to evolving information technology and emerging threats.
guidelines.2: We provide information security education to all employees and ensure the policy is thoroughly communicated, striving to raise and maintain awareness.
guidelines.3: We set objectives for the management system and information security, review them regularly, and continuously implement and maintain improvements.
guidelines.4: We delegate responsibility and authority to the management representative in order to execute, maintain, and improve the management system.

recruitmentDisclosure.eyebrow: Disclosure for Fee-Charging Employment Placement Services
recruitmentDisclosure.heading: Recruitment Business Disclosure
recruitmentDisclosure.preamble: In accordance with Article 32-13 of the Employment Security Act and Article 24-5 of its Enforcement Regulations, we disclose the following items.

section1.heading: 1. Regulations on Business Operations

privacy.heading: ■ Protection of Personal Information
privacy.manager: ・Personal Information Protection Manager: Representative Director Yuto Ogata
privacy.statement: ・We appropriately manage the personal information of job seekers and employers, and do not disclose or provide it to third parties without the individual's consent. We also respond promptly to requests for disclosure, correction, or deletion of personal information.

purpose.heading: ■ Purposes of Use of Personal Information
purpose.intro: We use the personal information obtained through our employment placement operations for the following purposes.
purpose.item1: ・Providing job seekers with the most suitable job information and managing progress
purpose.item2: ・Referrals to recruiting companies and conducting selection
purpose.item4: ・Managing information in accordance with laws (such as the Employment Security Act)

fee.heading: ■ Collection of Fees
fee.statement: ・We collect fees from employers (recruiting companies) based on a contract concluded in advance.

complaint.heading: ■ Handling of Complaints
complaint.manager: ・Complaint Handling Manager: Representative Director Yuto Ogata
complaint.statement: ・When a complaint is raised, we handle it promptly and appropriately in good faith.

refund.heading: ■ Refund System
refund.statement: ・If a referred worker leaves the company early, we have a system in place to refund fees. For details, please refer to "3. Refund System."

section1.pdfLink: ・View details of the regulations on business operations here

section2.heading: 2. Fee Schedule
section2.intro: The fees we charge employers (recruiting companies) are as follows.

notified.heading: ■ Notified Fees
notified.amount: ・Fee amount: 35% of the placed candidate's expected annual income (consumption tax separate)
notified.note: *Expected annual income refers to the total wages (including base salary, allowances, and bonuses) anticipated to be paid during the first year from the date of permanent hire.

section2.pdfLink: ・View details of the fee schedule here

section3.heading: 3. Refund System
section3.intro: If a candidate we referred leaves the company early after joining, we have a system to refund a portion of the placement fee received.
section3.rateHeading: ■ Refund Rate (in the case of voluntary resignation)
section3.rate1: ・Resignation within 1 month of joining: 80% of the placement fee
section3.rate2: ・Resignation after 1 month and within 3 months of joining: 50% of the placement fee
section3.rate3: ・Resignation after 3 months and within 6 months of joining: 10% of the placement fee
section3.note: *This system does not apply in cases of dismissal, bankruptcy, resignation due to reasons attributable to the employer, or resignation due to conditions significantly different from those agreed upon in advance.

section4.heading: 4. Business Operator Information
section4.name: ・Business name: STARUP, Inc.
section4.address: ・Address: 109 Nishijin Sangyo Sozo Kaikan, 97 Kaikamori-cho, Kamigyo-ku, Kyoto City, Kyoto
